memberdef.name: texidc
memberdef.initializer: = { IDC_TEX0, IDC_TEX1, IDC_TEX2, IDC_TEX3, IDC_TEX4, IDC_TEX5, IDC_TEX6, IDC_TEX7, IDC_TEX8, IDC_TEX9, IDC_TEX10, IDC_TEX11, IDC_TEX12, IDC_TEX13, IDC_TEX14, IDC_TEX15, }

memberdef.name: pbdesc
memberdef.initializer: = { {TYPE_RGBA, NULL, FALSE, PB_AMB}, {TYPE_RGBA, NULL, FALSE, PB_DIFF}, {TYPE_RGBA, NULL, FALSE, PB_SPEC}, {TYPE_RGBA, NULL, FALSE, PB_EMIS}, {TYPE_FLOAT, NULL, FALSE, PB_SHIN}, }
